sources_used: PropertyVow HDB block pages (22 Dover Crescent, 206 Clementi Ave 6)
StackProperty HDB block pages (704 West Coast Road, 206 Clementi Ave 6)
notes: D05 executive-flat evidence is thin on active asking listings, so the estimate is anchored mainly on recent D05 resale transactions and block-level portal data. I adjusted larger executive comps (146–162 sqm) down toward the subject’s 130 sqm / 1,399 sqft size. The resulting size-adjusted cluster sits roughly S$873k–S$1.04M, with premium Dover/Clementi St 13 blocks supporting the upper end. URA caveats are not the primary source for HDB resales; HDB open resale data mirrored by portal datasets was more relevant here. All figures are SGD.
